creator: timur@gnu.org
text:
On Sat, Sep 02, 2006 at 11:50:15PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> >Synopsis:       [MAINTAINER-UPDATE] net/samba: update to 3.0.23c
> >Arrival-Date:   Sat Sep 02 23:50:15 GMT 2006

Apparently, installation of the slave ports got broken by this update. 
Please, keep it on hold.

With regards,
Timur.
